error_map.hint: notion access token is missing or invalid; re-run pm credentials add notion
notion integration lacks access to this resource; share the database/page with the integration
notion rate limit exceeded; the connector will retry with backoff

conformance.reason: StreamHook-handled (POST /search body-carried start_cursor/filter pagination the declarative read path cannot express -- engine/read.go always issues a nil request body; see docs.md's Streams notes); hook-covered, proven live by archived parity evidence for notion (TestParityNotion_DatabasesSearchBodyCursorPagination) and internal/connectors/hooks/notion/hooks_test.go.

StreamHook-handled (POST /search body-carried start_cursor/filter pagination the declarative read path cannot express -- engine/read.go always issues a nil request body; see docs.md's Streams notes); hook-covered, proven live by archived parity evidence for notion (TestParityNotion_DatabasesSearchBodyCursorPagination) and internal/connectors/hooks/notion/hooks_test.go.

Routed through the same StreamHook as databases/pages for a single consistent dispatch path across the bundle, even though GET /users' query-param start_cursor pagination is independently declarative-expressible (docs.md Known limits); hook-covered, proven live by archived parity evidence for notion (TestParityNotion_UsersQueryCursorPagination) and internal/connectors/hooks/notion/hooks_test.go.
